# Crypto.com

Real time price quotes, order books, conversions, candlestick charts and more for cryptocurrency tokens from Crypto.com  
‍  
You can use the Crypto.com connector to:

Check Cryptocurrency Prices:**  
‍**"What is the price of Bitcoin?"

Track Daily Price Changes:**  
‍**"How much has Ethereum gained today?"

View Trading Volume:**  
‍**"How much SOL has been bought and sold today?"
